checklistItemsEvaluated: Approved file scope is exact and contains no extra files.
v1.1 includes first-client readiness and config checklist without creating active client records.

v1.1 includes client setup, account registry, content intake, content calendar, post package builder, approval queue, weekly report draft, config readiness, blocked live actions, and audit activity preview sections.
Default account state is not_connected and default posting mode is draft_only.
Approval is required and live posting is blocked by default.
Social OAuth, scheduling, analytics API use, n8n activation, paid tools, production deploy, and credential storage are blocked by default.
Only REQUIRED_ placeholders are used for client, brand, platform, handles, posting volume, approval owner, content pillars, brand voice, and reporting cadence.
No dependencies, paid services, tracking scripts, live form wiring, external calls, deployment config, credentials, or real client private data are present.
improvementRecommendations: Run a browser responsive and accessibility review before wider use.

Redeploy only the dedicated staging-only Netlify site after target PR merge.
